_description: Wave 200: office-coffee bit. Reuses existing clips: Eli typist (margie-typewriter-correct), Bart filing-cabinet. Fired 2026-05-31 without new gens.
title: The Coffee Machine, Status Report

voiceover.instructions: Deadpan documentary register. Slow, level, slightly weary.

segments.name: title_open
segments.text:
THE COFFEE MACHINE

Status: as of March
still broken
segments.narration: The coffee machine. Status, as of March, still broken.
segments.instructions: Documentary opener. Three short fragments. Falling tone on each.

segments.name: eli_complaint
segments.narration: Eli has filed three complaints. With the building manager.
segments.instructions: Two short sentences. 'With the building manager' as a separate beat, slight pause.

segments.name: bart_remembers
segments.narration: Bart says the previous coffee machine was better. He will not specify which one.
segments.instructions: Read as factual report. 'He will not specify which one' said with the same affect as the first sentence — no winking.
